debug_info.goal:
μ ν : Measure ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsProbabilityMeasure μ
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure ν
n : ℕ
i j : Fin n
h : i ≠ j
⊢ HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n)

proof:
constructor
  · exact (offDiagonalEntryMeasurable n i j).aemeasurable
  · dsimp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
    haveI : ∀ p : Index n, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) := fun p ↦ by
      dsimp [wignerMeasureDist]; split_ifs <;> infer_instance
    split_ifs with h_eq h_lt
    · contradiction
    · rw [WignerMeasure, (measurePreserving_eval (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h_lt⟩).map_eq]
      dsimp [wignerMeasureDist]
      rw [if_neg (ne_of_lt h_lt)]
    · have h_gt : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_gt h_lt) h.symm
      rw [WignerMeasure, (measurePreserving_eval (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) ⟨(j, i), le_of_lt h_gt⟩).map_eq]
      dsimp [wignerMeasureDist]
      rw [if_neg (ne_of_lt h_gt)]
successful_attempts:
constructor
  · exact (offDiagonalEntryMeasurable n i j).aemeasurable
  · dsimp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
    haveI : ∀ p : Index n, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) := fun p ↦ by
      dsimp [wignerMeasureDist]; split_ifs <;> infer_instance
    split_ifs with h_eq h_lt
    · contradiction
    · rw [WignerMeasure, (measurePreserving_eval (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h_lt⟩).map_eq]
      dsimp [wignerMeasureDist]
      rw [if_neg (ne_of_lt h_lt)]
    · have h_gt : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_gt h_lt) h.symm
      rw [WignerMeasure, (measurePreserving_eval (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) ⟨(j, i), le_of_lt h_gt⟩).map_eq]
      dsimp [wignerMeasureDist]
      rw [if_neg (ne_of_lt h_gt)]
